title: AG48 to AG53 Product Sequence Plan

planned_sequence.title: Panchang and Festival Surface Scaffold
planned_sequence.scope: Create governed static/non-runtime surface structure for Panchang and Festival view.

planned_sequence.title: Today's Vedic Guidance Surface Scaffold
planned_sequence.scope: Create non-deterministic guidance surface structure using safety and review controls.

planned_sequence.title: Word of the Day and Reflection Surface Scaffold
planned_sequence.scope: Create word/reflection surface using corpus governance, attribution and review states.

planned_sequence.title: Star Reflection Surface Scaffold
planned_sequence.scope: Create star-reflection product surface without runtime/prediction activation.

planned_sequence.title: User Personalisation and Account Boundary
planned_sequence.scope: Plan personalization/account boundary without activating Auth.

planned_sequence.title: Assessment and Insight Layer Governance
planned_sequence.scope: Plan psychometric/assessment/AI-insight governance without production activation.
